meaning: n.令马停住的声音  准尉 WO(Warrant Officer)
examples: My name is Rick.(wo shi Li Ke).
A wo man's speech function is activated and she starts talking, often non-stop.
For a more detailed look at the relationship between (wo)man and machine, check out the infographic.
The third challenge is to recruit more (wo)men to do the required work on the ground and in missions.
